title: cynometra greenwayi
intro: Cynometra greenwayi, also known as the Greenway's ironwood or ironwood tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Cynometra greenwayi include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds. Cynometra greenwayi is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the leaves or bark are steeped in water to release its medicinal compounds.
